title: The Count of Monte Cristo
posterAlt: The Count of Monte Cristo (2024) movie poster
tmdbOverview: Edmond Dantès becomes the target of a sinister plot and is arrested on his wedding day for a crime he did not commit. After 14 years in the island prison of Château d’If, he manages a daring escape. Now rich beyond his dreams, he assumes the identity of the Count of Monte-Cristo and exacts his revenge on the three men who betrayed him.
synopsis: Released in 2024, The Count of Monte Cristo is a adventure, action and drama film from France. It holds a solid 7.6 rating on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a 12 certification (AT rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
